name: sop-compact
description: Hooks-only compaction-survival procedure for Claude Code. A PreCompact hook auto-bootstraps a per-repo .claude/sop-compact.md on first compact, then runs a claude -p sidecar that promotes durable learnings and writes a handoff snapshot before /compact; a SessionStart hook (gated on source=compact) points the new session at the latest handoff. No user-typed /compact argument needed and no per-repo init step — works with bare /compact (manual or auto).
